blended.narrative: Meadowlark is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: dry, highs of 31°F, winds around 21 mph.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 8" over the past week. Current depth: 17".
